query:
SELECT
                a.message_id AS "message_id: _",
                a.local_attachment_id AS "local_attachment_id: _"
            FROM attachment a
            JOIN message m USING (message_id)
            WHERE m.chat_id = ?
                AND (m.timestamp, m.message_id) >= (?, ?)
                AND (m.timestamp, m.message_id) <= (?, ?)
            ORDER BY a.message_id, a.rowid
